code: import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const STEP_LABELS=["Travel","Stay","Food","Local","Plan"];function ProgressBar(props){const{activeStep=0,preTravel=false}=props;function renderSeparator(index){if(index>=STEP_LABELS.length-1){return null;}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"planner-step-bar-sep","aria-hidden":"true",children:"\u2014"});}function renderStepLabel(label,index){let isDone=false;if(!preTravel){if(index<activeStep){isDone=true;}}let isActive=false;if(preTravel){if(index===0){isActive=true;}}else{if(index===activeStep){isActive=true;}}let itemClass="planner-step-bar-item";if(isDone){itemClass+=" planner-step-bar-item--done";}if(isActive){itemClass+=" planner-step-bar-item--active";}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:itemClass,children:[label,renderSeparator(index)]},label);}function renderSteps(){return STEP_LABELS.map(function mapStep(label,index){return renderStepLabel(label,index);});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"planner-step-bar",role:"navigation","aria-label":"Planning steps",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"planner-step-bar-inner",children:renderSteps()}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"planner-step-bar-line","aria-hidden":"true"})]});}export default ProgressBar;
